nodes.title: Model links
widgets_values:
We are using quantized weights in this workflow, the original flux 2 repo is [here](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-dev/)

Guide: [Subgraph](https://docs.comfy.org/interface/features/subgraph)

## Report issue

Note: please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/zh-CN/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare the required models. Desktop/Cloud ship stable builds; nightly-supported models may not be included yet, please wait for the next stable release.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)


## Model links (for local user)

**text_encoders**

- [mistral_3_small_flux2_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/mistral_3_small_flux2_bf16.safetensors)

**loras**

- [Flux_2-Turbo-LoRA_comfyui.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/ByteZSzn/Flux.2-Turbo-ComfyUI/resolve/main/Flux_2-Turbo-LoRA_comfyui.safetensors)

**diffusion_models**

- [flux2_dev_fp8mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/flux2_dev_fp8mixed.safetensors)

**vae**

- [flux2-vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── mistral_3_small_flux2_bf16.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 loras/
│   │      └── Flux_2-Turbo-LoRA_comfyui.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── flux2_dev_fp8mixed.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── flux2-vae.safetensors
```

Scene: EXT. FOREST FLOOR — FAIRY HOLE — CONTINUOUS
- Beat: Carston's eyes open. The heaviness is inescapable. Something is wrong. He is back. He looks down at the still body.
- Shot Size: CU
- Lens: Cooke Anamorphic 75mm
- Character: CARSTON — 55, eyes opening
- Prompt: close-up cinematic portrait of 55-year-old man lying on forest floor with eyes opening slowly, expression carrying enormous inescapable weight, soft morning forest light filtering through trees, moisture in eyes, natural skin texture, ultra photorealistic, handheld documentary style, Super 35mm, Cooke Anamorphic 75mm, shallow depth of field, cold muted color grade, fine 35mm film grain
Angle: Birds eye view. directly looking down to the floor. 


- Camera Body: Super 35mm / Cooke Anamorphic primes
- Visual Language: photorealistic, high-quality documentary style, natural skin texture, realistic environmental detail, handheld camera, high dynamic range, restrained
- Color Grade: natural palette, restrained warm white-gold bioluminescent accents only where mycelium appears
- Texture: fine 35mm film grain, textured skin and skin tones, organic material realism, tactile surfaces
- AVOID: CGI look, cartoon, illustration, oversaturated neon, fantasy glow, sci-fi blue grid, low resolution, plastic skin, exaggerated stylization, psychedelic color
